steps.description:
Click the "Create" button for the "Tab App with Azure Functions" sample in the "Featured samples" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
And input ${{var:app_name:hello-world-tab-with-backend}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Sign in to Azure" link under the "test01@xxbdw.onmicrosoft.com" account in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit panel in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Debug in Docker (Edge)" dropdown button in the Run and Debug panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Debug in Docker (Chrome)" option in the Debug configuration dropdown menu within the Run and Debug sidebar of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Debug" drop-down menu in the "RUN AND DEBUG" panel at the top left of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Show user profile using Single Sign On feature" card in the SSO Bot local tab of Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Send" button (paper plane icon) in the message input area to send the typed message "show" in the Microsoft Teams SSO Bot local chat window.
